title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules for effective prompting of Claude Code based on studying Anthropic engineers' practices: prompt skills not features, build composable skills, save scripts inside skills, and control invocation patterns. The video claims most users are prompting incorrectly and presents these rules as universally applicable.
